evidence.claim: [CDK9] Cyclin-dependent kinase 9 / P-TEFb / transcription elongation — VERDICT: MOST PLAUSIBLE RESCUE CANDIDATE - direct mTORC1 pathway intersection, with caveats. CDK9/P-TEFb directly intersects the mTORC1 pathway (transcription elongation control); the blind pass ranks CDK9 the most plausible knockdown-rescue candidate, with on-target toxicity caveats.
